summary: Batch 5.7 Financial & Data Integrity Repair - All features verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly. Financial math fixed (RM 18.00), Financial Snapshot widget redesigned, live student names working, pagination with total count, payout validation functional, PhoneInput with Malaysia default.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/teachers/{id}/transactions returns pagination info (total, limit, skip) and live student names via $lookup
GET /api/teacher/dashboard-data returns month_stats with net_earnings and gross_earnings from tutor_earnings_transactions
Financial Snapshot widget shows Net Income in text-3xl font-bold text-emerald-700 and Gross Generated in text-sm text-slate-500
TierWidget shows 'Progress to Rated Tutor' with X/20 progress bar for new tutors
Payout modal has max validator - entering amount > wallet.balance shows red 'Insufficient funds' error
PhoneInput uses react-phone-input-2 with country='my' for Malaysia (+60) default
Migration script has corrected all historical data: base_session_price=30, tutor_earnings=18, admin_revenue=12
seed_data_creation: Test data from migration script - teacher has 1 completed class with corrected financial records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5.7 financial fixes verified. Key data: teacher_e288221828e6 has wallet balance RM 18.00 (corrected from 16.20), total_classes=1, 1 transaction 'Naurah Medina - 30 min session' with net=18, gross=30. Financial Snapshot widget replaced old 'This Month' widget. Payout modal validates max amount against wallet.balance. PhoneInput uses Malaysia +60 default.

fix_2_financial_snapshot_widget.details: Widget shows 'Financial Snapshot' title, Net Income in large emerald text, Gross Generated in muted text
fix_2_financial_snapshot_widget.css: Net: text-3xl font-bold text-emerald-700, Gross: text-sm text-slate-500

fix_3_name_synchronization.details: Transactions endpoint resolves live student names via student_id lookup

fix_5_earnings_history_format.details: Transaction shows 'Naurah Medina - 30 min session' with '+ RM 18.00'

fix_6_payout_max_validator.details: Payout modal shows 'Insufficient funds' error when amount > balance

fix_7_phone_input_malaysia_default.component: Shows Malaysia flag and +60 by default

Bank Name, Account Number, Account Holder fields
'Insufficient funds' red error when amount > balance

Name, Email (disabled), Phone, Gender, Timezone fields
